Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}As always, countless books line[n]the shelves inside the store.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 5 13 6 2 103}Oh, {f 4 2}-chan! Looks like today's going to be a great day![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 104 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 5 13 6 3 104}I'm so happy to see you. Make yourself at home, {f 4 2}-chan.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I spent a while talking[n]with the elderly couple.[n]{f 1 1}
